description: Portico plugin sources. Given a GitHub URL (or a catalog id), the app clones, packages, and installs without manual folder picking.

sources.name: markdown-viewer-provider
sources.notes: Builds upstream Chrome dist into vendor/engine; always re-applies Portico bridge (provider.js, chrome-shim, styles, vendor/fallback) so upgrades keep default fast path + host protocol.

sources.name: markdown-rich-provider
sources.notes: Shipped under examples/plugins; no external GitHub required.
